item.title: 谷歌必须与 Android 上的人工智能竞争对手公平竞争，这对你的钱包来说可能是个好消息
item.summary: After forcing Google to open up Android to third-party app stores, the EU is back with a new target, and this time it’s Gemini‘s home-field advantage. The European Commission ordered Google on July 16 to give rival AI apps the same deep access to Android that’s currently exclusive to Gemini. The order falls under the E
